series_metadata.series_title: Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee Application/Agreement
series_metadata.series_description: Records contain all current Gaming Employee Applications and Agreements. Each Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee Application and Agreement identifies the name, address, personal information, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: copy in a secure area with access limited only persons who need records carry out their duties and responsibilities (which is continually updated and maintained duration of active Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee License). Upon license cancellation, records are moved Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee Application / Agreement Schedule 950-1011
